testcase.name: test_05

failure.message: El registro de proyecto lanzó una excepción inesperada: CENV3/4: El CIF debe tener 9 caracteres

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: test_06

error.message: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'C'

testcase.error:
Traceback (most recent call last): File "C:\Users\Javier\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 58, in testPartExecutor yield File "C:\Users\Javier\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 651, in run self._callTestMethod(testMethod)
File "C:\Users\Javier\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Lib\unittest\case.py", line 606, in _callTestMethod if method() is not None: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Javier\PycharmProjects\G85.2026.T02.EG2\.venv\Lib\site-packages\freezegun\api.py", line 951, in wrapper return self._call_with_time_factory(time_factory, func=func, args=args, kwargs=kwargs) ^^^^^^^ File "C:\Users\Javier\PycharmProjects\G85.2026.T02.EG2\.venv\Lib\site-packages\freezegun\api.py", line 934, in _call_with_time_factory result = func(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^ File "c:\users\javier\pycharmprojects\g85.2026.t02.eg2\src\unittest\python\test_register_project_tests.py", line 123, in test_06 res = manager.register_project(cif, acronym, description, ^^^^^^^^^^^ File "c:\users\javier\pycharmprojects\g85.2026.t02.eg2\src\main\python\uc3m_consulting\enterprise_manager.py", line 30, in register_project if not self.validate_cif(company_cif): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ File "c:\users\javier\pycharmprojects\g85.2026.t02.eg2\src\main\python\uc3m_consulting\enterprise_manager.py", line 124, in validate_cif add_even = int(number[1]) + int(number[3]) + int(number[5]) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10: 'C'
